overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a third-person perspective of a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks, passes under building overpasses, and crosses busy intersections with futuristic vehicles and crowds of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: pedestrian in brown vest passes by and exits frame to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, observing the neon-lit cityscape and passing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road with headlights on

entered.detail: tall cylindrical display showing animated pink holographic figure
massive skyscraper with prominent green neon 'Orbital Air' signage
large vertical billboard with green and pink neon graphics displaying 'WIDE OPEN'
green metal railings separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked downtown sidewalk illuminated by vibrant neon signs. The camera moves forward past a holographic advertisement pillar on the right, while the iconic Orbital Air tower dominates the skyline ahead. Futuristic vehicles cruise along the multi-lane road to the right, separated by green metal railings.

events.description: enters covered area beneath building overpass, lighting shifts to darker artificial sources

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the building overpass, passing large vertical billboards

entered.detail: dark concrete overpass creating covered walkway with reduced lighting
massive vertical advertisement displaying a large soda can with 'BIG' text
green illuminated sign with red 'ALL FOODS' text

segments.scene_description: The character moves under a building overpass into a darker, semi-covered walkway. The environment shifts from open neon-lit street to a more enclosed space with artificial lighting. Large advertisements including a prominent soda can billboard and the All Foods sign line the left side as the Orbital Air tower becomes visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with outdoor dining approaching intersection

events.description: exits covered walkway back into open neon-lit street
approaches crosswalk where pedestrians are gathered waiting to cross

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor cafe seating and approaching a busy intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk for the signal to change

entered.detail: row of tables and chairs with umbrellas outside a restaurant
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
tall pole with traffic signals showing red light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene returns to the open neon-lit street with outdoor cafe seating lining the left sidewalk. The character approaches a busy intersection where a moderate crowd has gathered at the crosswalk. The traffic light shows red as pedestrians wait to cross the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with moving traffic

events.description: begins crossing the intersection as traffic stops for pedestrians
white futuristic car drives past the crosswalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection with a group of pedestrians, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan driving through the intersection, yielding to pedestrians

entered.detail: sleek white vehicle with blue accent lighting and futuristic design
open paved area where multiple roads meet with colorful crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection crosswalk, joining a crowd of pedestrians crossing the multi-lane road. A distinctive white futuristic car passes by on the right as the character navigates the colorful striped crosswalk. The Orbital Air tower remains visible in the background while the character completes the crossing to the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-slicked downtown district that transitions from open neon streets into a sheltered walkway before emerging into a crowded city intersection. It begins on a vibrant sidewalk past a holographic advertisement pillar, with the Orbital Air tower looming over a road filled with futuristic vehicles. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a darker, semi-covered overpass lined with large soda and All Foods billboards, momentarily enclosing the view. The scene then opens back onto the neon-lit street past outdoor cafe seating, leading toward a busy crosswalk where a crowd of pedestrians waits under a red light. Finally, the camera joins the pedestrians in crossing the multi-lane road, passing a distinctive white futuristic car while the Orbital Air tower remains a constant landmark in the background.
